item.offroad.tire.placement_error: Must be placed on the front of a Wheel Mount!

block.offroad.wheel_mount.tooltip.summary: Mounts _wheel-like_ items to allow for ground travel.
block.offroad.wheel_mount.tooltip.behaviour2: _Steers_ the wheel toward the _side the signal is from_.

borehead_bearing.insuffecient_rockcutting_wheels:
Attached structure does not include any _Rock Cutting_ _Wheels_:
A minimum of _one_ is required.
borehead_bearing.insuffecient_inventory_blocks: Attached structure does not include any _inventory_ blocks.
borehead_bearing.too_many_items: This contraption is unable to excavate.
borehead_bearing.too_many_items_description: There is _insufficient_ _storage_ to gather more blocks. _Remove_ excess items in order to continue excavating.
